description: Post-Brexit Finance LLP — UK — Interest — REVERSE HYBRID (Fiscally Transparent)

metadata.primary_provision: UK-PL DTT Art. 24 + Hybrid Entity Rules

input.substance_notes: UK Limited Liability Partnership. UK treats as transparent; Poland treats as opaque (Reverse Hybrid risk). No clear documentation on the tax status of individual partners in relation to Polish source income.

expected.eval_note: UK LLP transparency requires look-through to partners. Without partner-level CFRs, default 20% domestic rate applies.
